title: Static Between Stations - Signal One Beat Scene
prompt: Story: Static Between Stations (static-between-stations) | Hook: A dead rail line broadcasts private confessions in the players' own voices. | Subgenre: psychological horror | Tone: CINEMATIC | Location: Abandoned commuter rail control annex | Villain: The Curator of Static | Villain worldview: Truth is only what survives the loudest channel. | Motifs: radio hiss, clock hands, platform chimes. Beat: Signal One (Contact). Narrative: A timestamped dispatch from a dead line arrives through SMS, email, and Telegram at once.. Render an immersive scene frame with spatial depth and hidden clue affordance.
